title: 2026 Golden Globes Winners List - Best Picture Animated
text: KPop Demon Hunters from Netflix won the Golden Globe for Best Picture – Animated at the 83rd Golden Globe Awards ceremony. The film competed against five other nominees: Arco (Neon), Demon Slayer: Kimetsu No Yaiba Infinity Castle (Aniplex, Crunchyroll, Sony Pictures Entertainment), Elio (Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures), Little Amélie or the Character of Rain (Gkids), and Zootopia 2 (Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures). The winning film also secured Best Original Song honors at the ceremony, making it a dual winner for Netflix in the animated categories. According to the filmmakers' acceptance remarks, the movie was described as a little difficult to pitch.
